title: alchemilla minor
intro: Alchemilla minor, also known as the lady's mantle or lesser alchemilla, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the rose family that grows in damp environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and menstrual issues. The health benefits of Alchemilla minor include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and regulating menstrual cycles. Alchemilla minor can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream for its medicinal and health benefits.
